titleStmt.title: SII 23.92: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 92. (A.R. No. 92 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 9: 1224-25 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the 9th year of king Māṟavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva (I) ‘who was pleased to present the Chōḷa country’ (acc. A.D. 1216). It records an endowment of 12 achchu and odd of money to the temple of Nilai-uḍaiya-Pāṇḍiśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi in Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by one Rājasiṁhaṉ Tirumāliruñjōlai Nārāyanaṇ Śivakalyāṇanambi a resident of Talaichchaṅgāḍu a quarter (chēri) of the place, for the maintenance of the persons who were to recite the Tirumuṟai (Dēvāram hymns) in the temple. The individuals with whom this money was invested were to measure out every morning 8 nāḻi and 1 āḻākku of paddy to the temple authorities for this purpose. Reference is made incidentally to a dēvadāna land (measuring 5(1/2) mā) at Elivāram belonging to the temple of Nālāyira-Īśvaram-Uḍaiyār, the cultivating right over which is said to have been sold by the donor of the above gift for a consideration of 10 achchu towards meeting the value of his endowment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykeḷvikkumel śrīkomāṟa tirubhu[vanacca]
kravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrī cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu
9vatu taimāsam muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājacaturvedimaṅ
kalattu Iraṇṭāñceri talaiccaṅkāṭṭu rājasiṁhaṉ tirumāliruñco
lai nārāyaṇaṉ civakalliyāṇanampiyeṉ Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai kalla
ṭaikuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār nilaiuṭaiya pāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyilil
tirukkaikuṭi tirukkāppu nikki tirumuṟai Ōtuvāṟku Amutupaṭikku In nāyaṉār koyilil tiruppaṭiyil tā
ṉam paṇṇi niraṭṭikkuṭutta poruḷāvatu nāṉ nālāyirayiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam Eli
vārattu nilam Aimmāvaraikku nāṉ Uḻavumāṟṟi kuṭutta Accu pattum Iḷaṅkomaṅkalattu civapirāmaṇa
r kaṭava Accu Iraṇṭe Iraṇṭu māvum Āka Accu paṉṉiraṇṭe Iraṇṭu māvum tiruppaṭikke niraṭṭik
kuṭuttu Ivvaccukkaḷukku nāṉuṭaiya piṭipāṭukaḷum moṭukki Ivvaccu paṉṉiraṇṭe Iraṇṭu māvukku U
paiyam nāḷ 1- kku nellu Eṇṇāḻi Āḻākkāka Amutupaṭiyāka koṇṭu cattirātittavaṟ cella tirumuṟai Ō
tuvārākavum Ivvaccukaḷ kaṭaviyavarkaḷ śrīpaṇṭārattil Oṭikkiṉāl Innāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattile mālaiytoṟum ca
ntirātittavaṟai Innellu viṭṭuvaruvatāṉamaikku Ippaṭi cammatittu kallil veṭṭikkuṭutteṉ talaiccaṅkāṭṭu rāja
siṁhaṉ tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ civakalliyāṇa nampiyeṉ In nāyanār koyil tirumuṟai Otuvāṟku .
Digital edition of SII 23.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
